case_title: HERRERA, CHRISTIE vs. SUNSET SCAVENGER, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERRERA, CHRISTIE AS TO DEFENDANT SUNSET SCAVENGER, INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-16-2000 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-14-2000 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-30-2000
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-23-2000 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-23-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON MAY-23-2000, SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY CLIFFORD A HANSEN., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-07-2000 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-16-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT; TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL ALL OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY HANSEN CLIFFORD. HEARING SET FOR JUL-26-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-26-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SHOW CAUSE WHY ENTIRE ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PURSUANT TO CRC 525. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY CLIFFORD A HANSEN. HEARING SET FOR OCT-03-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
